distinctive_elements: line-by-line scanline rendering for road effects
multiple skylines and environments per stage
dashboard UI with speedometer and tachometer

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Rad Racer II
notes: Rad Racer II is a racing game developed by Square. Visual design documented as sprite-based with behind-vehicle perspective. Game features 8 driving stages with different environments (Key West, Big Apple, Gettysburg, Monument Valley, Las Vegas Blvd., Rocky Mountains, Twilight California, Bay Bridge). No specific sprite dimensions, color palette counts, or animation frame data documented in available sources. Game uses scanline-based rendering for road effects. Competitor vehicles range from Volkswagen Beetles to Ferrari Testarossas. Anaglyph 3D capability present via included glasses.
